text: Both Bitcoin and Ethereum are down 2% over the past day, signaling mild selling pressure across the major assets, while smaller caps like Solana are experiencing sharper declines. The Fear & Greed index at 14 reflects extreme fear conditions, though a slight 2-point rise over the week suggests some stabilization rather than accelerating panic. Bitcoin dominance holding at 56% and modest $80B daily volume indicate that despite the pessimistic mood, there's neither a flight to safety into BTC alone nor capitulation-level selling.
